vulnerabilities.description: torch.load() 使用 weights_only=False 加载 checkpoint 文件，存在 pickle 反序列化漏洞。攻击者可以通过篡改 checkpoint 文件注入恶意 pickle payload，实现任意代码执行。文件路径来自命令行参数，无路径验证。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: 命令行参数(args.load_dir) -> load_hf_files_to_dict(directory_path) -> os.listdir(directory_path) -> file_path -> torch.load(file_path) [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: torch.load() 使用 weights_only=False 加载 Megatron checkpoint 文件。checkpoint 文件路径来自命令行参数 load_dir，无验证，存在 pickle 反序列化 RCE 风险。
torch.load() 使用 weights_only=False 加载 TP 分片的 checkpoint 文件。文件路径来自命令行参数，无路径验证，存在 pickle 反序列化漏洞。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: args.load_dir -> input_model_dir -> get_model_file_path() -> model_file -> torch.load(model_file, weights_only=False) [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: torch.load() 使用 weights_only=False 加载 HF 模型 .bin 文件。文件路径来自命令行参数 hf_dir，无路径验证，存在 pickle 反序列化漏洞。
torch.load() 使用 weights_only=False 加载 Megatron checkpoint 文件用于转换到 HF 格式。文件路径来自命令行参数 mg_dir，无路径验证。
torch.load() 无 weights_only 参数加载 checkpoint 文件，默认为 False，存在 pickle 反序列化漏洞。checkpoint_name 来自 args.load 路径。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: args.load -> load_dir -> get_checkpoint_name() -> checkpoint_name -> torch.load(checkpoint_name, weights_only=False) [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: torch.load() 在 backward compatibility 处理中无 weights_only 参数加载 checkpoint，存在 pickle 反序列化漏洞。
Unsafe pickle deserialization via torch.load() with weights_only=False. Attacker-controlled checkpoint file paths from CLI arguments can lead to arbitrary code execution.
Explicit weights_only=False in torch.load() enables pickle-based RCE from attacker-controlled checkpoint paths.
Explicit weights_only=False enables pickle-based RCE from attacker-controlled checkpoint paths.
Unsafe torch.load with explicit weights_only=False from CLI-controlled HF model directory.
Unsafe torch.load with explicit weights_only=False from CLI-controlled MG model directory.
Conditional unsafe deserialization from CLI-controlled directory.
vulnerabilities.code_snippet: exist_model = torch.load(file_path, map_location='cpu', weights_only=False) if os.path.exists(file_path) else {}

vulnerabilities.description: Unsafe checkpoint loading in longcat conversion.
Unsafe checkpoint loading in longcat conversion (final layer).
Central unsafe deserialization function in PP/VPP checkpoint conversion.
Missing weights_only parameter in torch.load() defaults to unsafe pickle deserialization.
Missing weights_only parameter in torch.load().
Explicit weights_only=False enables pickle-based RCE from checkpoint paths.
Explicit weights_only=False in exception handler.
Unsafe deserialization of checkpoint received from distributed peer rank. Malicious peer can send pickle payload.
vulnerabilities.data_flow: distributed.recv() from peer rank → buffer → torch.load()

vulnerabilities.description: torch.load() 使用 weights_only=False 反序列化从其他 rank 接收的 checkpoint 数据。数据来自分布式传输，虽然来源是可信 rank，但仍存在被篡改风险。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: torch.distributed.recv() -> state_dict_tensor -> state_dict_bytes -> buffer -> torch.load(buffer, weights_only=False) [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: exec() 执行模型生成的代码用于 HumanEval 测试。虽然 reliability_guard() 提供了有限的保护（注释明确说明这不是真正的安全沙箱），但模型生成的代码可能执行恶意操作。代码内容来自模型推理输出。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: 模型输出 completion + problem['prompt'] + problem['test'] -> check_program -> exec(check_program) [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained() 使用 trust_remote_code=True。即使有 local_files_only=True，如果本地模型仓库被篡改或用户下载了被污染的模型，trust_remote_code=True 允许执行模型中的自定义代码。tokenizer_name_or_path 来自命令行参数。
AutoModelForCausalLM.from_config() 使用 trust_remote_code=True 加载模型配置。config 来自 load_dir 目录，如果目录被篡改，可执行恶意代码。
vulnerabilities.code_snippet:
config = AutoConfig.from_pretrained(load_dir, trust_remote_code=trust_remote_code)
hf_model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_config(config, trust_remote_code=trust_remote_code)

vulnerabilities.description: importlib.import_module() 动态加载转换器插件模块。模块名来自命令行参数 --loader 和 --saver，通过字符串拼接构造模块名，可能导致加载任意模块。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: 命令行参数 known_args.loader -> module_name = f'{MODULE_ROOT}.{plugin_type}_{name}' -> importlib.import_module(module_name) [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: torch.load() 在向后兼容代码中无 weights_only 参数加载 checkpoint，默认为 False，存在 pickle 反序列化漏洞。checkpoint_name 来自 args.load 路径。
torch.load() 无 weights_only 参数加载 checkpoint，默认为 False，存在 pickle 反序列化漏洞。
torch.load() 使用 weights_only=False 加载已存在的 HF 模型文件。文件路径来自命令行参数 hf_dir。
vulnerabilities.code_snippet: exist_model = torch.load(file_path, map_location='cpu', weights_only=False) if os.path.exists(file_path) else {}

vulnerabilities.type: Improper Control of Generation of Code
vulnerabilities.description: Dynamic module loading via importlib.import_module() with user-controlled module name from CLI arguments allows arbitrary module loading.

vulnerabilities.type: Improper Control of Generation of Code
vulnerabilities.description: Dynamic module loading with user-controlled module name (mirror of convert_ckpt.py).

vulnerabilities.type: Improper Neutralization of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code
vulnerabilities.description: exec() executes model-generated code for HumanEval benchmark. reliability_guard() provides limited protection but is NOT a real security sandbox.

vulnerabilities.type: Improper Verification of Source of Communication Channel
vulnerabilities.description: trust_remote_code=True in AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained allows arbitrary code execution from model repository.
Unchecked array bounds in build_exhaustive_blending_indices. num_datasets not validated against sizes array length; output arrays not validated against required size.
vulnerabilities.code_snippet: for (int32_t i = 0; i < num_datasets; ++i) { total_size += sizes_ptr[i]; } // OOB if i >= sizes.shape(0)
vulnerabilities.data_flow: Python caller → sizes array + num_datasets → unchecked array access

vulnerabilities.description: build_blending_indices writes to output arrays for size iterations without bounds validation.
vulnerabilities.data_flow: Python caller → output arrays + size parameter → unchecked write

vulnerabilities.description: build_sample_idx reads from sizes array using indices from document_idx without bounds validation.
vulnerabilities.code_snippet: auto document_index = document_idx[document_idx_index]; auto document_length = sizes[document_index];
vulnerabilities.data_flow: document_idx values → used as indices into sizes → OOB read if invalid

vulnerabilities.description: build_mapping_impl reads from sizes array using sent_index from docs array without bounds validation.
vulnerabilities.data_flow: docs[doc] → sent_index → sizes[sent_index] → OOB if sent_index >= sizes.shape(0)

vulnerabilities.description: build_blocks_mapping_impl reads from sizes and titles_sizes using indices from docs without bounds validation.
vulnerabilities.code_snippet: const auto sent_index_first = docs[doc]; const auto target_seq_len = max_seq_length - titles_sizes[doc];
vulnerabilities.data_flow: docs values → used as indices → OOB read

vulnerabilities.description: subprocess.run() 执行从模型输出生成的 Python 测试文件。虽然使用列表形式传参而非 shell=True，但测试文件内容来自模型输出，可能包含恶意代码。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: 模型输出 answer -> extract_answer_code(answer, task) -> test_file -> subprocess.run([python_execute, test_file]) [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: tokenizer 初始化时强制设置 trust_remote_code=True，允许执行 tokenizer 中的自定义代码。tokenizer_path 来自外部配置。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: tokenizer_path -> AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(kwargs) -> kwargs 包含 trust_remote_code=True [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: tokenizer 初始化时强制设置 trust_remote_code=True，允许执行 tokenizer 中的自定义代码。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: tokenizer_path -> AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(kwargs) -> kwargs 包含 trust_remote_code=True [SINK]

vulnerabilities.description: hub_token (hf_hub_token, ms_hub_token, om_hub_token) 通过命令行参数或YAML配置传递，可能被记录到日志或进程列表中。这些token用于访问私有模型仓库，如果泄露可能导致未授权访问。
ms_hub_token 和 om_hub_token 通过命令行参数传递，用于访问ModelScope和Modelers私有数据集。可能被记录到日志、进程列表或系统审计日志中。
vulnerabilities.data_flow: 命令行参数/YAML配置 -> model_args.ms_hub_token -> MsDataset.load(token=ms_hub_token)

vulnerabilities.description: logger.info(f"Arguments: {self.args}") 直接打印所有参数到日志，可能泄露敏感信息如 hf_hub_token、ms_hub_token 等认证凭证。
logger.info(f"Arguments: {args}") 直接打印所有参数到日志，可能泄露敏感信息。
Integer overflow check is broken - check happens AFTER multiplication which may have already overflowed.
Variable Length Arrays on stack based on num_datasets parameter can cause stack overflow.
vulnerabilities.data_flow: num_datasets → stack allocation → stack overflow if large

vulnerabilities.description: Critical input validation uses assert() which is disabled in release builds with -DNDEBUG.
